# Onboarding Guide: <Role>

<details>
<summary>How to use this template</summary>

- Tailor each onboarding guide to a specific role or discipline.
- Include time-bound milestones (Day 0, Week 1, Month 1) with measurable
  outcomes.
- Link to required trainings, systems access, and buddy assignments.
- Remove this block before sharing with new hires.

</details>
